methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran-Israel Strikes and Syria Border Closure Heighten Turkiye's Border Risks
bullets: US-Israeli attacks on Tehran province killed six children, and Iranian missile attacks on central Israel and Haifa caused injuries.
Israel's renewed Lebanon strikes forced the closure of a Syria border crossing, increasing border security pressure.
The concurrent escalations in Iran and Syria represent the most operationally significant threats to Turkiye's border environment this window.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor for further Iran-Israel missile exchanges and Syria border disruptions.
